# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: default
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      restartPolicy: Always
      containers:
        - name: batch-processor
          image: your-registry/batch-processor:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          env:
            - name: NODE_ENV
              value: production
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: "1Gi"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - sh
                - -c
                - test -f /tmp/healthy
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - sh
                - -c
                - test -f /tmp/ready
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
